reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. Spotless restrooms. Business always well-equipped and immaculate. Prompt and friendly service. Complete control over the volume of product dispensed, both liquids and CNG. Security with trained and attentive staff.

reviews.comment:
Lo mejor. Siempre una atención espectacular y asesoramiento impecable. La limpieza y la pulcritud  inmejorables. Tenés lugar para compartir con tu mascota y toda la onda de la terraza con la huerta orgánica, tiene aromáticas que le dan una fragancia especial al ambiente. Gracias por brindar un espacio tan ameno.

The best. Always spectacular service and impeccable advice. The cleanliness and tidiness are unbeatable. You have a space to share with your pet, and the whole vibe of the terrace with the organic garden has aromatic plants that give the air a special fragrance. Thank you for providing such a pleasant space.

¡Un cordial saludo!
